Found the bug. The proxy's `sanitizeContentBlocks` function on line 122 allows `"image"` type blocks to pass through, but xAI's API doesn't support the Anthropic `image` content type (base64 image blocks inside `tool_result`). The error is at `messages[164].content` which contains a `tool_result` with an `image` type block inside it (from a `Read` tool that returned a screenshot/image).
